positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of cosmic flora and fauna, featuring bioluminescent glowing vines, massive glowing petals, and stylized mythical celestial creatures interwoven in a central composition. The style is high-contrast, intricate line work mixed with vibrant digital painting, reminiscent of Art Nouveau and scientific diagram art. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, midnight blue, emerald teal, and pops of electric cyan and gold leaf accents. Dramatic rim lighting makes the edges of the subject pop against a dark, nebula-filled background. The design must be clean, vector-like, and highly scalable, perfect for printing on dark apparel fabric, with strong, defined silhouettes and a whimsical yet grand aesthetic.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, poor anatomy, bad composition, cropped, ugly, duplicate, extra limbs, noise, grainy
